prompts: Cinematic medium shot in a warm Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge with wooden textures. Yuna Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes, and Yuna Moonvale, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, work together at a workbench. Starling firmly steadies a metal shield while Moonvale carefully guides a repair tool across the surface. Soft forge lighting, focused expressions, cooperative hands, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent camera angle and lighting. Yuna Moonvale taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield with the tool while Yuna Starling maintains a steady, supportive grip. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm ambient forge glow, no text, no watermark.
